Who says you can't surf Cleveland?

September 1995
Journalism & NewsroomTechnology

The Car Rock '95 IRE/NICAR computer-assisted reporting conference has launched web pages featuring panel information, speaker biographies, and resources for both attendees and those interested in obtaining conference materials through tapes and handouts.

Who says you can't surf Cleveland?

The local planning committee for Car Rock '95 is running a home page for the third annual IRE/NICAR computer-assisted reporting conference. It's at http://www.multiverse.com:80/carrock Or you can jump off NICAR's home page to http://nicar.org/nicar/cleveland/

The sites offer a lists of panels and speakers, speakers' biographies, and more.

For those who miss the conference, the sites are a handy way to figure out which panels you would want to catch on the rebound - from tapes and tip sheets.

To order tape recordings of sessions, call Sound Images at (303) 649-1811. For handouts, call Investigative Reporters and Editors at (314) 882-2042.
